themes.name: Agentic AI in research
themes.description: Articles focusing on AI agents that can autonomously perform research tasks, make decisions, and interact with systems.

themes.name: AI coding assistants
themes.description: Content discussing AI tools that help developers write, debug, and optimize code.

themes.name: AI summarization
themes.description: Articles about AI's ability to condense large amounts of text into concise summaries, often for research notes or meeting transcripts.

themes.name: AI research tools
themes.description: Coverage of specific AI-powered tools and platforms designed to aid in various research activities.

themes.name: AI workforce impact
themes.description: Discussions on how AI is changing job roles, skills required, and the overall labor market, particularly in research and design.

themes.name: AI for product management
themes.description: Content detailing how AI is being used to assist product managers in strategy, decision-making, and workflow optimization.

themes.name: AI for design & research
themes.description: Articles focused on the direct application of AI tools and techniques within the design and user research processes.

themes.name: AI sentiment feedback
themes.description: Focuses on AI's capability to analyze and interpret user feedback, reviews, and sentiments.

themes.name: AI for qualitative research
themes.description: Articles covering AI applications for gathering and analyzing qualitative data, such as interviews and open-ended survey responses.

themes.name: AI chatbot research
themes.description: Content specifically about the use of AI chatbots for research purposes or the research surrounding chatbot capabilities and limitations.

note: Themes identified by analyzing articles from curated sources, Google News, HackerNews, and DEV.to this month.
